data.body: DONE (config-loop, commit b584f267). Hard-removed PROJECT_ROOT (unprefixed duplicate of REBAR_ROOT, env-var review var 2); REBAR_ROOT is now the single repo-root override. AC1 (no os.environ read of PROJECT_ROOT in src): collapsed every "REBAR_ROOT or PROJECT_ROOT" chain to REBAR_ROOT across config.py, reads.py, _cli/_init.py, _commands/{txn,init}.py, and 11 reconciler modules; engine_env no longer pins PROJECT_ROOT (dropped the vestigial REBAR_ROOT<->PROJECT_ROOT mirror branch — an inherited REBAR_ROOT carries through dict(os.environ)); removed PROJECT_ROOT from config._env_signature. grep confirms ZERO PROJECT_ROOT references remain in src OR tests. AC2 (reads.py reversed-order fixed): reads.py:75 previously resolved PROJECT_ROOT-before-REBAR_ROOT (PROJECT_ROOT winning) — now REBAR_ROOT only, consistent with config.repo_root. AC3 (tests migrated + green): removed all PROJECT_ROOT set/delenv from ~13 test files (REBAR_ROOT was co-set in every SET site — verified); added 2 regression tests (repo_root honors REBAR_ROOT; ignores a lone PROJECT_ROOT). Full offline suite green: 1929 passed, 9 skipped. Also synced docs/scripts (architecture.md, README, probe-rebar.sh). Subagent review: src+tests ship-ready, no broken or-chains, fail-closed verify gate untouched, no behavior regression beyond the intended PROJECT_ROOT-only break (verified PROJECT_ROOT+REBAR_ROOT were always co-set; only an external caller setting ONLY the unprefixed PROJECT_ROOT is affected — exactly the duplicate being removed); remediated the doc/script stragglers it flagged. NOTE: init.py module docstring has a PRE-EXISTING "ignores REBAR_ROOT" vs code-reads-REBAR_ROOT inconsistency (not introduced here) — left for a follow-up. Parent 77aa now blocked only by EV-2b.
